title: Aakash Hospital - Leading Multi-Speciality Hospital in Delhi
heading: Your Trusted Hospital for Quality & Affordable Healthcare in South Delhi
description: Aakash Hospitals is the Best Multispeciality Hospital in Delhi. A top hospital, providing world-class health care services & treatment.
text:

We believe in patient-centric care with affordable options for a superior healthcare experience. Gynaecology Expert care for women’s health needs, including obstetrics and gynecology, is provided by experienced specialists in our dedicated department. know more General Surgery Comprehensive surgical care by skilled surgeons for a wide range of medical conditions in our General Surgery department. know more ENT Advanced and specialized care for ear, nose, and throat conditions delivered every patient at an affordable cost through Comprehensive Integrated clinical practices, medical Innovation, and lifelong learning. We are dedicated to meet the needs of our patient, staff, and nation. Join us in our Journey as we shape ?Healthcare? for a better tomorrow. Read More About Us Testimonials What Our Patients Are Saying My rating is based on the home service provider, Sister Sunita Sharma who visited my 88 yr old mother today. Very happy and satisfied with the way she handled my mother. Thank you, sister. Vinita Sharma Source: Google Reviews A good hospital for middle class. It has friendly environment and staff members are very cooperative. Comparative expenses are also low as compared to other hospitals but treatments and facilites are good. Ajit Jati Source: Google Reviews Very affordable and high quality treatment it’s really very nice hospital in South Delhi Ritesh Kushwaha Kumar Source: Google Reviews My experience at Aakash Hospital during the delivery of my first child was amazing. Thanks to the doctors and nurses. Great experience. Mohit Sharma Source: Google Reviews I was suffering from worst cervical pain. And luckily I met Dr. Vallabhi who is an expert and well experienced physio within few sessions I was feeling a lot better. Yasar Rehman Source: Google Reviews The hospital is really good with skilled and polite staff. Really happy with the affordable services and transparent treatment. Anum Khan Source: Google Reviews Hospital ka staff bohot acha hai. Mere bete ko dengue hua tha, bohot jaldi thik ho gaya vo yahan admit karate he. Thankyou aakash hospital. Reena Singh Source: Google Reviews I found myself in Home not in hospital, it was very good experience with every one. Special thanks to Dr. Rk mehra Sweta Singh Source: Google Reviews Write a Review Book An Appointment Why Choose Us We Truly Care For Our Patients Expert Medical Team Our team of experienced physicians, nurses, and support staff are experts in their respective fields. Advanced Technology Latest medical equipment and technology to ensure accurate diagnosis, effective treatment, and positive patient outcomes. Comprehensive Services From routine check-ups to complex surgeries, we offer a wide range of medical services to cater to the diverse needs of our patients. Patient-Centric Care Our approach ensures that each patient is treated with respect, dignity, and compassion, and is actively involved in their healthcare decisions. View All Videos Get In Touch Contact Us With Your Queries How do I schedule an appointment with the doctor? For an appointment, you can click any ‘book appointment’ button on our website. Alternatively, call us on our Landline Number 01140501000 (click to dial) . When is the hospital open? Aakash Hospital is open 24×7 even on Sundays and national holidays. What insurance plans does Aakash Hospital accept? We accept all insurance claims. Do you provide emergency services? Our emergency services are open 24×7. You may call on any of the two numbers 011 40501000 or +91-9818166605 . Yes, I agree with the privacy policy . Send Message Call Us 011 40501000    2025.
